name: decouple-generalize-vision-language
description: Self-evolving learning approach for vision-language reasoning in data-scarce scenarios
content:
## Context-First Self-Evolving Learning

### Core Concept

This skill implements techniques from paper arXiv:2512.06835 for improving agent reasoning, adaptation, and decision-making in complex tasks.

### Implementation

See paper for implementation details: https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.06835

### Practical Guidance

Key techniques from this paper can enhance agent capabilities in:
- Reasoning under uncertainty
- Adaptive learning
- Multi-step planning
- Robustness and generalization

Refer to the paper's methodology sections for specific implementation guidance.
